title: OpenTickets
description: An open-sourced in-game support system with tickets and support teams!
body:
This is a custom developed Support Ticket Plugin. Its intended to be an Open-Source Ticket plugin that allows servers to establish an in-game support system.

## Commands
/tickets
Description: opens the ticket viewer menu
> Permission: tickets.view

/tickets create <description>
Description: creates a new ticket!
> Permission: tickets.create

/tickets change_group <ticketUUID> <group>
Description: changes the selected ticket to the chosen support group.
> Permission: tickets.changegroups

/tickets add_note <ticketUUID> <note>
Description: adds a note to the selected note. Anything after the UUID is added to this note prepended with the author name.
> Permission: tickets.notes

/tickets rename <ticketUUID> <ticketName>
Description: sets the selected ticket's new name
> Permission: tickets.rename

/tickets reload
Description: reloads the config.yml
> Permission: tickets.reload

Admin Permission
> tickets.admin
This allows access to all commands and features.

## GUI Interactions
### Ticket Viewer Interactions
Ticket Viewer is restricted to 45 viewable tickets at a time.

> Left-Click: opens Ticket Options GUI\
> Right-Click: opens Ticket Notes GUI (non-interactive)\
> Shift+Left-Click: teleport to Ticket Location\
> Shift+Right-Click: CLOSES THE TICKET

### Filtered Views:
Interacting with the Hopper in slot 49 will filter through the support group views, still limited to 45 items.

### Ticket Options GUI
Should be self explainatory?

### Ticket Notes GUI
This is a rough implementation to view Ticket Notes. Utilizes deprecated code and will be updated in the near future.

## Support or Suggestions?
Please use "Issues" on Github or My fancy support discord
